name: Maci Wall Sconce - SCN4059 - Bronze - Safavieh
description: Illuminate your space with the Maci Wall Sconce in a warm bronze finish. This elegant piece showcases a sleek design that blends effortlessly with various decor styles. Crafted from durable materials, the sconce offers both style and function. Its timeless bronze color adds a touch of sophistication to any room, whether used to accent a hallway or enhance a living area. The simple yet striking structure of the Maci Wall Sconce complements its surroundings while providing a soft and inviting light. Transform your home?s ambiance and indulge in the graceful aesthetics and practicality this fixture brings.
